articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: U.S. to issue commemorative passports with Trump’s picture for America's 250th birthday - NPR
articles.description: The State Department said that it is preparing a limited release of commemorative U.S. passports celebrating America's 250th birthday that feature a picture of President Donald Trump.
articles.content: WASHINGTON The State Department said Tuesday that it is preparing a limited release of commemorative U.S. passports celebrating America's 250th birthday that feature a picture of President Donald Tru… [+2853 chars]
